form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 2nd of 9 at Dundalk All Weather on April 1 over 2112m, 0.8 len behind Emmeleia carrying 58.5kg at $4.30. Plenty of improvement to come and is among the leading contenders.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 9th of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on November 21 over 1609m, 11 len behind Sky Watch with 58kg at $81. Went for a spell before returning 8th of 13 at Gowran Park on April 8 over 1408m, slow going 15 len behind Bobby Mcgee carrying 58.5kg at $26. Still early in the prep and might need more time.
